basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Candidates should refer to the official notification for age limit details who have B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A./LLM./CA/CMA/CS/MBA/Professional qualification or equivalent, or Graduate degree with 4 years experience with minimum 60% marks (55% in 10th & 12th) are eligible to apply for these Project Associate-I vacancies. The online application process for IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 10 May 2026.

qualification.details: B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A./LLM./CA/CMA/CS/MBA/Professional qualification or equivalent in an appropriate discipline. OR B.C.A./B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A./LLB. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 04 years of post-qualification experience. The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards, and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for details on the selection process.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate-I position at IIT Gandhinagar is 10th May 2026. Ensure you submit your application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate-I position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 45,000/- to Rs. 70,000/-.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A./LLM./CA/CMA/CS/MBA or equivalent, or a B.C.A./B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./B.B.A./LLB with at least 4 years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate-I post at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Associate-I position is contract-based.

faq.question: Q8. What are the minimum percentage requirements for academic qualifications?
faq.answer: A minimum of 60% or equivalent grade is required from Graduation onwards, and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, where a direct download link will be provided.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIT Gandhinagar offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation for reserved categories is not explicitly detailed here. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific details.
